scripts.dev:frontend:install: cd apps/frontend && npm i && npm run dev
scripts.dev:backend:install: cd apps/backend && npm i && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.deps:update:backend: cd apps/backend && npx npm-check-updates -u && npm install
scripts.deps:update:frontend: cd apps/frontend && npx npm-check-updates -u && npm install
scripts.deps:update:all: npm run deps:update:backend && npm run deps:update:frontend && npm run deps:update:root
